title: Ability to show selected tasks and subtasks on a gantt
excerpt: I would like the ability to create a gantt view that shows a mixture of tasks and subtasks, but does not show every subtask under a task if it is selected.

posts.author: Kirby (Kirby Birch)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like the ability to create a gantt view that shows a mixture of tasks and subtasks, but does not show every subtask under a task if it is selected.
